title: Cervical screening documentation
specialty: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Defines programme population, HPV-based screening, triage and screen-triage-treat pathways with different considerations for women living with HIV.
assessment.rationale: Supports programme population and screening-pathway context for cervical screening documentation; no decision is generated.

source.title: WHO guideline for screening and treatment of cervical pre-cancer lesions for cervical cancer prevention, second edition
source.jurisdiction: International WHO guidance requiring national programme adaptation
source.population: General population of women and women living with HIV within programme-defined cervical screening ages and pathways.
source.setting: Organised cervical screening, triage, treatment and follow-up programmes.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting an identified screening test, result, programme population, triage or follow-up already selected by a clinician or programme. It does not infer a result, diagnosis, treatment or UAE interval.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines programme population, HPV-based screening, triage and screen-triage-treat pathways with different considerations for women living with HIV.

assessment.text: Supports documenting an entered HPV or triage result and clinician-selected next pathway while preserving age, HIV, test and programme qualifiers.
assessment.rationale: Supports entered HPV or triage result and clinician-selected next-pathway documentation for cervical screening documentation; no decision is generated.
